messages.author: swarm
messages.text: This ticket needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve" to approve it.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Negotiation relay supervisor must kill a superseded relay child before respawning (BL-403 gap)
What it solves: Same bug class as BL-403, on a different Telegram poller. Telegram allows
exactly one getUpdates long-poller per bot token; a second poller gets HTTP
409 and the two fight over the offset, producing unreliable/duplicated/
dropped delivery. BL-403 closed this for the front-desk bot; the onboarding
n…
How it works: Restarting a stalled/crashed relay child terminates the prior pid (SIGTERM -> bounded grace -> SIGKILL) before spawning the replacement
